name: syspilot
postCreateCommand: pip install -r docs/requirements.txt && curl -sL https://github.com/enthali/jarvis/releases/latest/download/jarvis.vsix -o /tmp/jarvis.vsix && CODE=$(find /home/vscode/.vscode-server/bin -name code -path '*/remote-cli/*' | head -1) && $CODE --install-extension /tmp/jarvis.vsix
